item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Lemon and thyme roasted chicken served on creamy beetroot risotto withvegetables, topped with parmesan and fresh parsley. Lemon on the side (6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Thai massaman beef meatballs with warm spices and creamy depth, served withjasmine rice and sesame roasted carrots, topped with peanuts and parsley. Lime,fresh coriander and Asian coleslaw on the side (2+4+7+8+15) GREEN DISH: dish Thai massaman spiced lentil balls served with jasmine rice and sesame roastedcarrots, topped with peanuts and parsley. Lime, coriander and fresh Asiancoleslaw on the side (4+7+8+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Jambalaya with rice and chicken, the classic Creole dish packed with warmspices, vegetables and deep flavour. Inspired by the Southern cooking that alsogave name to the iconic song Jambalaya (On the Bayou) (10+15) GREEN DISH: dish GREEN DISH: jambalaya with kidney beans, vegetables and rice, rich in warmspices and comforting flavours (15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Gà Nướng, Vietnamese chicken marinated in oyster sauce and lemongrass, servedwith jasmine rice and fresh Vietnamese cucumber salad (3+7+8+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Gà Nướng with tofu marinated in soy sauce and lemongrass, served with jasminerice and Vietnamese cucumber salad (7+8+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Butter chicken in a rich and creamy spiced sauce, served with basmati rice andtopped with parsley. Mango pickle, poori and dried spinach flatbread on theside (1+6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Butter paneer in an aromatic creamy sauce, served with basmati rice and toppedwith parsley. Mango pickle, poori and dried spinach flatbread on the side
